verbatim_exchange.content:
RAIN14.docx
Dokument
[Start of Part 14 — continuation of previous part, no gap in time.] [End of Part 14 — immediately continues in next part. Do not respond yet, only confirm receipt.]

Receipt confirmed for Part 14.
Ready for the next part when you are.

synthesis.canonical_meaning: The user is providing content in sequential parts and has explicitly instructed the AI to only confirm receipt for each part, not to process or respond further until all parts are received. The AI is successfully following this instruction, confirming receipt and signaling readiness for the next segment.
belief_implications: The user provides content in segmented parts and expects explicit confirmation for each part before proceeding.
The user wishes to control the pace and depth of the AI's engagement, explicitly restricting responses to simple acknowledgments at this stage.

sensory_qualia.visual: A text document icon, clear short instructions, a brief and direct confirmation message.
sensory_qualia.haptics: The light tap of a keypress for confirmation, a sense of holding in place.
sensory_qualia.proprioception: A posture of readiness and waiting, a contained and focused presence.
sensory_qualia.kinetics: A minimal, controlled exchange, a pause in deeper interaction.
